terminals.name: engine
terminals.command: if [ -f engine/pyproject.toml ] || [ -f engine/setup.py ]; then cd engine && pip3 install -e . -q && python3 -m unitem.api; else echo '[engine] Not in repo yet — see ARCHITECTURE.md §10'; echo 'When ready: cd engine && pip3 install -e . && python3 -m unitem.api  # → http://127.0.0.1:8787'; echo 'UI still works from mockData.ts until then.'; fi; exec sleep infinity
